analysis.executive_summary: Audit of docs.adyen.com covered 4,309 pages (100% crawl coverage) across multi-project topology with 81% overall confidence. Critical issues include 171 confirmed broken internal documentation links and 0% API reference coverage despite 2,912 API pages detected. SEO/geo issues affect 11.49% of pages. Only 3.55% of pages display last-updated metadata, severely limiting freshness transparency. Example code reliability estimated at 88.38%.
strengths: Complete crawl coverage: 4,309 of 4,622 requested pages successfully crawled (100%)
High crawl confidence at 95% with no trap URLs encountered
Example code reliability estimated at 88.38%, indicating generally functional samples
Multi-project topology successfully mapped across documentation structure
risks: 171 confirmed broken internal documentation links create poor user experience and navigation failures
0% API reference coverage with 2,912 API pages detected indicates complete absence of usage documentation linkage
API confidence only 55%, suggesting potential detection or measurement limitations in API documentation analysis
11.49% SEO/geo issue rate may impact discoverability and international user access
3.55% last-updated coverage prevents users from assessing content freshness on 96.45% of pages
82 links excluded from analysis may hide additional broken link issues
Low API confidence (55%) combined with 0% reference coverage suggests systematic API documentation gaps

prioritized_actions.action: Fix all 171 broken internal documentation links to restore navigation integrity
Implement API reference-to-guide linking strategy to address 0% coverage across 2,912 API pages
Deploy last-updated metadata across all pages (currently only 3.55% coverage)
Investigate and resolve 11.49% SEO/geo issues affecting discoverability
Audit API detection methodology given 55% confidence and validate 2,912 detected API pages

limitations: External audit cannot verify accuracy of technical content, code functionality, or API specification correctness
55% API confidence indicates potential detection limitations; actual API coverage may differ from reported 0%
Cannot assess user authentication flows, interactive examples, or dynamic content requiring login
Broken link detection limited to crawled pages; 313 pages not crawled (4,622 requested vs 4,309 crawled) may contain additional issues
Example reliability estimate (88.38%) is algorithmic; actual code execution success requires runtime testing
